tool_input.content:
# Bead: b1

**Status:** hardened

## Description

This fixture documents the intent to test the verified->hardened transition guard.
The transition verified->hardened is NEVER valid; the bead must pass through proven first.
Note: in the test environment, git has no previous version of this file, so the
guard exits 0 (cannot determine previous status). The fixture records the design intent.
